name: 2-speaker turn-taking with overlap
description: Two speakers alternate with pauses, then overlap once. Tests speaker attribution and timing.
timing_notes: Each utterance needs: ~1s TTS synthesis + audio_duration + 1.5s pause. At ~150wpm Piper rate, 10 words ≈ 4s audio. Total per utterance slot: synthesis(1s) + audio(3-5s) + pause(1.5s) = 5.5-7.5s

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Good morning everyone. Let's start with the quarterly review.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Thanks for setting this up. I have the numbers ready.
utterances.notes: synthesis(1s) + audio(4s) + pause(2s) = 7s after A starts

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Great. Revenue was up twelve percent compared to last quarter.
utterances.notes: 7s after B starts (1s synth + 3.5s audio + 2.5s pause)

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: That's impressive. And the customer count?

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: We added forty three new customers this quarter, which is a record.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Excellent work by the sales team.
utterances.notes: 8s after A starts (longer A utterance). Overlap test next.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.notes: overlap: A starts 2s after B (while B still playing)

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Let's move on to the roadmap for next quarter.
